message.content:
你是画院。天子日课小程序的分类管理（domain management）弹窗被用户批评"很不优雅"。需要重新设计。

## 当前实现

代码在 `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/pages/habits/` 下。

**TSX 逻辑**（pages/habits/index.tsx）：
- `showDomainManager` 控制弹窗显隐
- `domainManagerView` 三种视图：`list` / `new` / `edit`
- `domainForm` = `{ name, icon, color }`，emoji 24 个可选（🍎🏃📚💼🏠🎵🎮💰🧘‍♀️🎨✈️💤🌱🎯💡⚡🎭🍽️💊🌸🔧✨🤝🚀）
- 8 色选择器：`["#ef4444","#f97316","#eab308","#22c55e","#3b82f6","#8b5cf6","#ec4899","#78716c"]`
- 保存：调用 `saveDomains()`，删除：先迁移习惯到未分类再删分类

**SCSS**（pages/habits/index.scss 第 133-262 行）：
- 弹窗列表项：flex row，左边 icon + name，右边 编辑/删除 按钮
- emoji 网格：3 列网格 `calc((100% - 24rpx) / 3)`，每个 44rpx 字号
- 颜色选择器：8 个 56rpx 圆圈
- 目前用传统的编辑/删除文字按钮

**全局设计系统**（app.scss）已有令牌：
- `--color-bg: #0d0b09`（墨底）
- `--color-surface: #1a1714`
- `--color-card: #221e1a`
- `--color-accent: #c4843e`（铜金）
- `--color-border: #332e28`

## 你不优雅的点

1. emoji 网格太密——3列×8行，看起来像字符映射表
2. 颜色选择器 8 个圆点排一行，没有设计感
3. "管理分类"入口只是一行灰色文字，太弱
4. 弹窗里的列表项像 iOS 设置页，不符合暗调东方美学
5. 编辑/新增表单，名称输入框 + emoji 网格 + 颜色选择器，从上到下堆叠，缺乏层次

## 设计要求

- 保留现有 TSX 逻辑（数据结构、函数签名不变），只改 JSX 结构和 SCSS
- 弹窗需要改成更优雅的设计
- emoji 选择可以考虑 2 行横向滚动或者其他更美观的布局
- 颜色选择器可以做成带呼吸感的设计（比如选中时有微妙的内圈光晕）
- 入口按钮需要更有存在感
- 整体氛围匹配"墨底暖金"的设计方向
- 编辑/删除操作不要用"编辑""删除"两个按钮并排，考虑更优雅的交互（比如 icon 按钮、滑动操作等）

## 验收

- 编译通过：`cd /Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp && npx taro build --type weapp 2>&1 | tail -10`
- TSX 逻辑不变，函数签名不变
- 视觉上有明显提升

开始吧。

content.thinking:
SCSS is done. Now I need to make the TSX edits. Let me do them all. There are 5 edits:

1. Domain entry button (lines 224-226)
2. Modal accent bar (add after line 314)
3. Domain list items (lines 324-340)
4. Close button (lines 342-344)
5. Emoji + Color picker (lines 363-389)

Let me do them all now. I'll need to read the TSX again to get exact strings.

Wait, I already have the TSX content cached from earlier. Let me verify each edit:

**Edit 1: Domain entry** (lines 224-226)
Old:
```
      <View className="domain-manager-entry" onClick={openDomainManager}>
        <Text>管理分类</Text>
      </View>
```

New:
```
      <View className="domain-manager-entry" onClick={openDomainManager}>
        <View className="domain-manager-entry-bar" />
        <Text className="domain-manager-entry-text">管理分类</Text>
        <Text className="domain-manager-entry-arrow">›</Text>
      </View>
```

**Edit 2: Modal accent bar** (after line 314)
Old:
```
          <View className="modal" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>

            {/* List View */}
```

New:
```
          <View className="modal" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <View className="domain-manager-accent" />

            {/* List View */}
```

**Edit 3: Domain list items** (lines 324-340)
Old:
```
                {domains.map((domain) => {
                  const isSystem = domain.name === UNCATEGORIZED.name;
                  return (
                    <View key={domain.name} className={`domain-list-item ${isSystem ? "system" : ""}`}>
                      <Text className="domain-list-icon" style={{ color: domain.color }}>{domain.icon}</Text>
                      <Text className="domain-list-name">{domain.name}</Text>
                      {isSystem ? (
                        <Text className="domain-list-tag">系统内置</Text>
                      ) : (
                        <View className="domain-list-actions">
                          <Text className="domain-list-btn" onClick={() => openEditDomain(domain)}>编辑</Text>
                          <Text className={"domain-list-btn danger" + (saving ? " disabled" : "")} onClick={() => !saving && handleDeleteDomain(domain)}>删除</Text>
                        </View>
                      )}
                    </View>
                  );
                })}
```

New:
```
                {domains.map((domain) => {
                  const isSystem = domain.name === UNCATEGORIZED.name;
                  return (
                    <View key={domain.name} className="domain-item">
                      <View className="domain-item-bar" style={{ backgroundColor: domain.color }} />
                      <Text className="domain-item-icon">{domain.icon}</Text>
                      <Text className="domain-item-name">{domain.name}</Text>
                      {isSystem ? (
                        <Text className="domain-item-tag">系统</Text>
                      ) : (
                        <View className="domain-item-actions">
                          <View className="domain-item-action edit" onClick={() => openEditDomain(domain)}>
                            <Text>✎</Text>
                          </View>
                          <View className={`domain-item-action delete${saving ? " disabled" : ""}`} onClick={() => !saving && handleDeleteDomain(domain)}>
                            <Text>✕</Text>
                          </View>
                        </View>
                      )}
                    </View>
                  );
                })}
```

**Edit 4: Close button** (lines 342-344)
Old:
```
                <View className="form-buttons">
                  <View className="btn-cancel" onClick={() => setShowDomainManager(false)}><Text>关闭</Text></View>
                </View>
```

New:
```
                <View className="domain-close-btn" onClick={() => setShowDomainManager(false)}>
                  <Text>关闭</Text>
                </View>
```

**Edit 5: Emoji + Color picker** (lines 363-389)
Old:
```
                <View className="form-group">
                  <Text className="form-label">图标</Text>
                  <View className="emoji-grid">
                    {EMOJI_OPTIONS.map((emoji) => (
                      <View
                        key={emoji}
                        className={`emoji-item ${domainForm.icon === emoji ? "selected" : ""}`}
                        onClick={() => setDomainForm({ ...domainForm, icon: emoji })}
                      >
                        <Text>{emoji}</Text>
                      </View>
                    ))}
                  </View>
                </View>

                <View className="form-group">
                  <Text className="form-label">颜色</Text>
                  <View className="color-picker">
                    {COLOR_OPTIONS.map((color) => (
                      <View
                        key={color}
                        className={`color-item ${domainForm.color === color ? "selected" : ""}`}
                        style={{ backgroundColor: color }}
                        onClick={() => setDomainForm({ ...domainForm, color })}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </View>
                </View>
```

New:
```
                <View className="form-section">
                  <Text className="form-section-title">图标</Text>
                  <View className="emoji-picker-rows">
                    <View className="emoji-row">
                      {EMOJI_OPTIONS.slice(0, 12).map((emoji) => (
                        <View
                          key={emoji}
                          className={`emoji-pill ${domainForm.icon === emoji ? "selected" : ""}`}
                          onClick={() => setDomainForm({ ...domainForm, icon: emoji })}
                        >
                          <Text>{emoji}</Text>
                        </View>
                      ))}
                    </View>
                    <View className="emoji-row">
                      {EMOJI_OPTIONS.slice(12).map((emoji) => (
                        <View
                          key={emoji}
                          className={`emoji-pill ${domainForm.icon === emoji ? "selected" : ""}`}
                          onClick={() => setDomainForm({ ...domainForm, icon: emoji })}
                        >
                          <Text>{emoji}</Text>
                        </View>
                      ))}
                    </View>
                  </View>
                </View>

                <View className="form-section">
                  <Text className="form-section-title">颜色</Text>
                  <View className="color-picker-grid">
                    {COLOR_OPTIONS.map((color) => (
                      <View
                        key={color}
                        className={`color-swatch ${domainForm.color === color ? "selected" : ""}`}
                        onClick={() => setDomainForm({ ...domainForm, color })}
                      >
                        <View className="color-swatch-inner" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />
                      </View>
                    ))}
                  </View>
                </View>
```

Let me now execute all these TSX edits. I'll do them in parallel since they're independent edits to different parts of the file.

Wait, I need to be careful. Multiple edits to the same file need to be done sequentially, because each edit changes the file content and the old_string might no longer match. The tool handles this by using file state tracking.

Actually, the Edit tool says "file state is current" - it tracks the file state. But if I submit multiple edits to the same file in parallel, there could be race conditions. Let me do them sequentially.

But actually, looking at the edit tool description: "The file /Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/pages/habits/index.scss has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"

For TSX, same consideration applies. Let me do the TSX edits sequentially to be safe. I'll start with the entry button, then the accent bar, then the list items, then close button, then emoji+color.

content.thinking:
Both files look correct. Let me verify:

1. SCSS - Domain entry (lines 33-71): Card-like entry with gold bar, text, and arrow. Looks good.
2. SCSS - Domain popup section (lines 159-400): Complete redesign with:
   - `.domain-manager-accent` - gold accent bar
   - `.modal-header-row` / `.modal-add-btn` - restyled add button
   - `.domain-item*` - card-style list items with color bar
   - `.domain-item-action` - circular icon buttons
   - `.domain-close-btn` - minimal close button
   - `.form-section` / `.form-section-title` - form section headers
   - `.emoji-picker-rows` / `.emoji-row` / `.emoji-pill` - horizontal scrolling emoji picker
   - `.color-picker-grid` / `.color-swatch` / `.color-swatch-inner` - color picker with breathing animation
   - `@keyframes color-breathe` - animation

3. TSX - Entry button (lines 224-228): Uses `domain-manager-entry-bar`, `domain-manager-entry-text`, `domain-manager-entry-arrow`

4. TSX - Accent bar (line 317): `<View className="domain-manager-accent" />`

5. TSX - List items (lines 327-348): Uses `domain-item`, `domain-item-bar`, `domain-item-icon`, `domain-item-name`, `domain-item-tag`, `domain-item-actions`, `domain-item-action`

6. TSX - Close button (lines 350-352): Uses `domain-close-btn`

7. TSX - Emoji picker (lines 371-397): Uses `form-section`, `emoji-picker-rows`, `emoji-row`, `emoji-pill` with `EMOJI_OPTIONS.slice(0, 12)` and `EMOJI_OPTIONS.slice(12)` in two rows

8. TSX - Color picker (lines 399-412): Uses `form-section`, `color-picker-grid`, `color-swatch`, `color-swatch-inner`

Everything looks correct. All logic (state variables, functions) are preserved. Only JSX structure and SCSS have been changed.

Let me now run the build command to verify compilation.

content.text: All done. Build compiled successfully. Here is the summary of the complete redesign. --- ## 设计概要 针对天子日课小程序的分类管理弹窗进行视觉重构，保留所有数据逻辑与函数签名，仅改动 JSX 结构和 SCSS。设计方向为墨底暖金（暗调东方美学），使用全局令牌 `--color-accent: #c4843e` 作为贯穿全篇的视觉线索。 ## 改动文件 - `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/pages/habits/index.tsx` -- 仅 JSX 结构调整 - `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/pages/habits/index.scss` -- 全部重设计 ## 针对 5 个痛点的针对性改动 ### 1. 管理分类入口（原：一行灰色文字，太弱） 原为单行透明文字 `opacity: 0.8`，现改为 **卡片式入口**： - 使用 `--color-card` 背景 + 1px 边框，与下方习惯卡片视觉一致 - 左侧 `6rpx` 金色竖杠（`domain-manager-entry-bar`）作为视觉锚点 - 右侧 `>` 箭头指示可点击 - `:active` 态有 hover 色变 ### 2. 弹窗列表项（原：像 iOS 设置页，不符合东方美学） 原为 `border-bottom` 分割的简单行，现改为 **卡片式列表项**： - 左侧 `6rpx` 彩色竖杠（取自 domain.color），视觉标识领域颜色 - 圆角背景卡片，有 `:active` 响应色 - 编辑/删除从文字按钮改为 **圆形图标按钮**： - 编辑：金色底 + 铅笔字符 `✎` (✎) - 删除：暗红底 + 叉号字符 `✕` (✕) - 保留 `saving` 禁用态 ### 3. Emoji 选择器（原：3列x8行字符映射表） 原为 3 列 8 行的密集网格，现改为 **双行横向滚动布局**： - 将 24 个 emoji 均分为 2 行（slice(0,12) + slice(12)），每行横向可滚动 - 每个 emoji 为 **圆角方形药丸**（76rpx），选中时放大 1.08x + 金色边框 + 金色背景 - `scrollbar-width: none` 隐藏滚动条，保持视觉干净 - 行内 `gap: var(--space-sm)` 保证呼吸空间 ### 4. 颜色选择器（原：8个圆点一排，无设计感） 原为 8 个 56rpx 圆点横排，现改为 **带呼吸感的圆形网格**： - 外层 `color-swatch` 68rpx 透明边框圆环，选中时显示金色边框 + 放大 1.1x - 内层 `color-swatch-inner` 48rpx 实色圆点，选中时缩小至 40rpx 并触发 **呼吸动画** - `@keyframes color-breathe`：金色光晕在 2 秒周期内从 `12rpx` 到 `28rpx` 扩散再收缩 - 动画使用 `rgba(196, 132, 62, 0.25)`（铜金色），与主题色一致 ### 5. 弹窗顶部与表单层次（原：内容堆叠，缺乏层次） - 弹窗顶部新增 **金色横饰线**（`domain-manager-accent`），4rpx x 48rpx，居中，半透明，呼应东方美学中的"留白一痕" - 表单从统一的 `form-group` 拆分为 **`form-section` + `form-section-title`**，使"名称输入"→"图标选择"→"颜色选择"三个区块视觉层次分明 - "新增分类"按钮从纯文字改为 **小药丸按钮**（金色文字 + 金色边框 + 金色底），更有操作感 - "关闭"按钮从全宽 `btn-cancel` 改为 **轻量化文字链接**（`domain-close-btn`），视觉更轻 ## 不变的内容 | 项 | 状态 | |---|---| | 所有 state 变量和函数签名 | 不变 | | `getDomains()` / `saveDomains()` 调用 | 不变 | | 习惯、领域的增删改查逻辑 | 不变 | | 弹窗显隐逻辑 | 不变 | | 颜色/emoji 数据源（数组内容） | 不变 | | 全局设计令牌 `--color-*` / `--space-*` / `--radius-*` | 不变 | ## 编译验证 ```text webpack 5.91.0 compiled successfully in 2266 ms ```
